summary: Completed comprehensive testing of banbansports UNDERGROUND HD cyberpunk sports streaming platform. All backend APIs and frontend UI elements working perfectly.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ returns success with message and version
Backend API /api/scores/live returns live score data with team1, team2, status fields
Backend API /api/channels returns all 14 channels with proper status
Backend API /api/stream/health returns ok:true for test stream URL
Frontend loads with banbansports logo visible in cyberpunk style
All 14 channel tabs visible and clickable (DEMO 1, DEMO 2, REKLAM, TRT 1, TRT HABER, TV 8, TRT SPOR, beIN SPORTS 1, beIN SPORTS 2, S SPORT, GS TV, FB TV, ATV, A SPOR)
REKLAM tab click loads MP4 video without loading spinner (ad mode working)
beIN SPORTS 1 tab click shows BAKIM MODU maintenance overlay with proper styling
Quality selector button visible showing AUTO text
Connection badge visible showing 4G indicator
Match banner shows team names (TÜRKİYE vs ROMANYA) and scores (0:0)
Sponsors section shows all required sponsors (MERİTKİNG, PAPARA, TOGG) plus 12 others
Server selector shows 6 servers with Sunucu 1 initially active
Server switching functionality works (tested Sunucu 2 activation)
Footer shows 'by lenstedreal' text
Scanlines overlay CSS class .scanlines is present
SESİ AÇ (unmute) button visible on video area
Video controls area with play, mute, PiP, fullscreen, cast buttons
Live score integration working (TÜRKİYE vs ROMANYA match data)
Cyberpunk theme with neon colors and glitch effects working
